fields.label: Momo
fields.description: He kōwhiringa kia whakaaturia he rauemi arapāho ki runga i te pātai.

semantics.label: He whakamāoritanga mō ngā Pātai Pono/Hē

fields.label: Tuhinga urupare
fields.default: I whiwhi koe @score o ngā piro @total ka taea
fields.description: He tuhinga urupare, ngā taurangi ka taea @score me @total. Hei tauira: 'I whiwhi koe @score o ngā piro @total ka taea'

fields.label: Te pae piro ā-kupu mō te hunga e whakamahi ana i te taupānga pānui tuhinga
fields.default: I whiwhi koe @score o ngā piro @total ka taea

fields.label: Te whakamārama hangarau tomopai mō te pātene  "Tirohia"
fields.default: Tirohia ngā whakautu. Ka tohua ngā whakautu tika, hē, me ngā pātai kāore i whakautua.

fields.label: Te whakamārama hangarau tomopai mō te pātene "Whakaatu otinga"
fields.default: Ka whakaaturia te otinga tika mō tēnei pātai, ngohe rānei.

fields.label: Te whakamārama hangarau tomopai mō te pātene "Whakamātau anō"
fields.default: Whakamātauria anōtia te ngohe. Ka whakakorengia ngā whakautu, ā, ka tīmatahia anōtia te ngohe.

semantics.label: Kōwhiringa whanonga
semantics.description: Mā ēnei kōwhiringa whanonga, ka taea te whakahaere i ngā whanonga o tēnei ngohe.

fields.label: Ka riro te "Tukuna" whakaaturia te pouaka whakaū
Ka riro te  "Whakamātau anō" whakaaturia te pouaka whakaū
Tirohia aunoatia te whakautu
fields.description: Kia mataara, ka pāngia te tomopai ina whakakāngia tēnei kōwhiringa

fields.label: Urupare mō ngā whakautu tika
fields.description: Ka whakakapi tēnei i te tuhinga uruapare taunoa. Ka taea ngā taurangi: @score me @total

fields.label: Urupare mō ngā whakautu hē
fields.description: Ka whakakapi tēnei i te tuhinga uruapare taunoa. Ka taea ngā taurangi: @score me @total
